description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, complemented by two smaller accent pillows in a slightly lighter shade. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary profile. The base of the sofa is flush with the ground, with no visible legs, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and understated aesthetic. This sofa would be suitable for urban outdoor or indoor public spaces, such as parks, lobbies, or communal seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy beige sofa with broad armrests, smooth upholstery, and two accent pillows. The design is minimalist, with a low-profile base and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, two large seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and two accent pillows on the right side.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat, with accent pillows visible against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the boxy silhouette, with no visible cushions or pillows.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the left armrest and the sofa's depth, with a partial view of the seat and backrest cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, with two smaller loose accent pillows placed on one side; all cushions are rectangular and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears flush with the ground, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, matching the armrest height, with two large, loose backrest cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with a matte finish and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
